page_metadata.biotools__summary: pLannotate is web server for automatically annotating engineered plasmids. pLannotate re-annotates engineered plasmids and shows you where the fragments are.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: pLannotate is web server for automatically annotating engineered plasmids. pLannotate re-annotates engineered plasmids and shows you where the fragments are.
